title: RAIA Property Card
description: Public-facing property listing card for the RAIA Protocol marketplace. Address is always masked to district level. Served from snapshot_listing in tbl_asset_snapshots.

raia_id.description: External stable property identifier. Format: prop-{jurisdiction}-{org-slug}-{sequence}. Example: prop-gb-rlf-000031.

rebuilt_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this card was last rebuilt.

agent_card_url.description: URL of the listing agent's RAIA agent card (/.well-known/raia-agent.json).

location.description: Masked location. Full address is never included in this schema.

headline.description: Short human-readable label. e.g. '1-bed flat, Hammersmith W6'.

available_from.description: ISO 8601 date when the property becomes available. Null if occupied with no vacancy.

asking_rent_pcm.description: Asking rent per calendar month in the jurisdiction's default currency. Null if not currently listed.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code. e.g. 'GBP', 'THB'. Null defaults to jurisdiction default.

features.description: Up to 10 notable features. e.g. ['Balcony', 'Porter', 'Permit parking'].

letting_agent.description: The estate agency managing this property.

verified.description: True if the agent is verified in the estateaigents.org registry.

enquiry_endpoint.description: URL to POST an enquiry to. Initiates the RAIA Protocol session state machine.

session_ttl_hours.description: Session TTL in hours. 24 for lettings, 720 for sales.

x-raia-notes.address_masking: Full address is NEVER included in this schema. District + postcode prefix only. Full address is transmitted once per enquiry session when session state reaches COMMITTED (human-approved viewing).
x-raia-notes.authentication: Anonymous requests return this public card. Bearer delegation tokens (scope: snapshot:tenant or snapshot:landlord) served via /api/raia/property/{raia_id} return role-gated narrative tiers. See ADR-211.
x-raia-notes.source_of_truth: snapshot_listing column in tbl_asset_snapshots. Rebuilt on asset/amenity/listing change. Zero LLM cost — template fill only.
x-raia-notes.reference_implementation: RentLondonFlat on estateaigents.com — agent card at https://app.estateaigents.com/.well-known/raia-agent.json
